title: Hiring Character Gauge
description: Interview questions, rules, and scoring for small business hires (2-15 people). Resume is secondary except technical roles. Three finisher questions reveal character and retention fit.
rules: Same core questions for every candidate in the same role. No improvisation.
Resume opens the door. Character questions decide (non-technical roles).
Technical roles: short skills gate first, then same character block.
One primary interviewer. Owner or trusted lead. No panel theater.
Take notes during or within 10 minutes after. Use scorecard template.
Do not hire on charm alone. Charm without substance = pass.
If uneasy after interview, pass. SMB cannot afford a bad month.
Never skip the three finisher questions. They trump the resume.
do_not_ask: Age, family plans, religion, disability, national origin
Arrest record (varies by jurisdiction; owner checks local rules)
Anything not job-related used to exclude a protected class

steps.label: 5-min phone or message
steps.goal: Availability, pay range alignment, basic fit

finisher_questions.note: Always ask all three in order. Score using scoring.json.

maybe_rule: Maybe expires in 48 hours. Second interview or pass. SMB cannot sit on maybes.
